The rank of '''Captain-Supervisor''' was held by [[Grammel]], an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] officer in command of the garrison and mining operation on the planet [[Mimban/Legends|Circarpous V]].<ref name="Splinter of the Mind's Eye">''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]''</ref>
